briefdescription.para: Writes the GENFIFO entries to transmit the messages requested.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_BUSY if a transfer is already in progress.

briefdescription.para: Enables the polling functionality of controller.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: Performs a transfer on the bus in polled mode.

detaileddescription.para: The messages passed are all transferred on the bus between one CS assert and de-assert.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.
Number of messages to be transferred.
